title: membership_role is the gate for every workspace mutation — read it first
summary: Every workspace write (rename, settings, member role, invite, cancel) requires owner/brand_admin; a client_user gets 403. The caller's role rides on listBrands/getMe as membership_role. A real incident (WR1, 2026-06-09) had GET /brands silently DROP membership_role, so brand-admins read as plain members and couldn't edit anything role-gated — proof that the field is load-bearing and must be checked, not assumed.
references: PR #1582 — brand-admin RBAC: membership_role restored on GET /brands
app/api/v1/brands.py — owner/admin gate on PATCH/DELETE brand/members/invitations routes
Clerk Organizations roles model (org:admin vs org:member) — https://clerk.com/docs/guides/organizations/control-access/roles-and-permissions
